title: Seasoned Couscous
description: Fluffy, well-seasoned couscous cooked in warm broth with cumin and garlic. Ready in minutes.

ingredients.note: fine or regular — not pearl/Israeli couscous

steps.instruction: Heat broth until just simmering. Add olive oil or butter and all seasonings.
Pour couscous into a bowl. Pour hot broth over couscous.
Cover tightly with plastic wrap or a plate. Let rest for 8–10 minutes until fully absorbed.
Fluff gently with a fork. Check that all grains are fully softened.
If any grains feel firm, add 2 tbsp more hot broth, re-cover, and rest 3–4 more minutes.
Before serving, stir in 2–3 tbsp additional warm broth so the couscous is visibly moist.
Serve in a bowl with extra broth spooned over the top if desired.

notes: Serving with extra warm broth prevents the couscous from drying out and keeps it perfectly moist.
